title: Nappy Bliss for affordable adult and baby nappies
description: BUSINESS NEWS - As a mother and...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - As a mother and granddaughter with personal experience of the essentials required for a baby and grandparents, Danielle Hull has come to realise the great need in George and environs for baby and adult nappies.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - As a mother and granddaughter with personal experience of the essentials required for a baby and grandparents, Danielle Hull has come to realise the great need in George and environs for baby and adult nappies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When she began sourcing affordable nappies for her own family members, she discovered that she could help other people too, and this was the spark for a new business, Nappy Bliss.","html":"When she began sourcing affordable nappies for her own family members, she discovered that she could help other people too, and this was the spark for a new business, Nappy Bliss."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Nappies are a huge expense and the fact that the ranges that I sell are well priced, helps moms and families to save quite a bit. They are good quality, soft on the skin and very absorbent. It is truly 'nappy bliss' with no worries about leaking if you have the right size.","html":"\"Nappies are a huge expense and the fact that the ranges that I sell are well priced, helps moms and families to save quite a bit. They are good quality, soft on the skin and very absorbent. It is truly 'nappy bliss' with no worries about leaking if you have the right size."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"I also supply a range of sanitary pads with different levels of absorbency,\" says Hull.","html":"I also supply a range of sanitary pads with different levels of absorbency,\" says Hull."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her prices are as follows:Adult nappies: R130 for a pack of 10Baby nappies: R60 per pack of 10Pullups for babies: R70 per pack of 10Sanitary pads: R15 for a pack of 10.She supplies on order only and delivers for free in George. Orders to further outlying areas are couriered.Online orders may be placed at https://nappybliss.zobaze.shop.","html":"Her prices are as follows:
Adult nappies: R130 for a pack of 10
Baby nappies: R60 per pack of 10
Pullups for babies: R70 per pack of 10
Sanitary pads: R15 for a pack of 10.
She supplies on order only and delivers for free in George. Orders to further outlying areas are couriered.
Online orders may be placed at https://nappybliss.zobaze.shop."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
